productDisplayName: Nike Mens Jordan Ptp'er White & Grey Shoes
description: Get ready to take your performance to the next level with these Jordan Prime Time Players from nike. Created for players looking for prime time performance, these shoes are filled with features that will help you rule the court.Upper Synthetic uppers for protection and durability Perforations that act as design features and allow for greater breathability Lace-ups for snug Fit Snug, ergonomic interior for comfort Cushioned collar and tongue for greater comfort Perforated tongue for greater breathability Jumpman logo on the tongue and side Midsole Full-length Phylon midsole for lightweight cushioning Outsole Highly specialised traction pattern allows for strong moves on hardwood and blacktop alike High volume Max Air unit in heel for high-impact support and responsive shock absorption Rubber outsole with herringbone pattern for multi-directional traction Jumpman logo on outsole shoe careDo not machine washRemove dust and dirt with damp clean clothDo not store in direct sunlight
